name: LIXI Pro Rack
description: The LIXI Pro Rack is a high-performance commercial energy storage cabinet designed for large solar installations, micro-grids, and industrial facilities. It features LiFePO₄ battery technology, intelligent BMS monitoring, air-cooled thermal management, and advanced communication interfaces. The system supports grid trading, peak-shaving, and backup power for commercial photovoltaic systems.

specs.bms: Master-slave intelligent BMS with full monitoring and protection
